category_sources: Official GitHub README describes tml as Terminal Markup Language for colored/formatted terminal text.
source_facts.description says this is a tiny markup language for terminal output.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub README title is tml - Terminal Markup Language.
docs_sources: Official GitHub repository README contains usage, format, and available tags documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/liamg/tml; per instruction, repo is returned as null.
tags_sources: Official GitHub README documents Go and Bash usage plus terminal color/attribute tags.
source_facts.description supports terminal and markup tags.
